text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf and I head to the racecourse for a
photoshoot in her signature racewear.

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text: Great work on the shoot today!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Likewise. I appreciate your hard work.

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
It's nothin', really! I mean, gettin' to photograph
the Emperor herself? It's an honor!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Here're the samples from the shoot. They came
out lookin' pretty nice, if I do say so myself!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
When an Umamusume first dons her signature
racewear, it's customary to send a photograph to
close relatives.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
There are few greater honors than being able to
wear our finery on the world's largest stage, so it's
only right to share that joy with those close to us.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
With that said, I'm debating whether or not I
should send a picture to my parents.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: It's... complicated.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, I haven't told you much
about my family, have I?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
My parents are... passionate and
uncompromising, shall we say. They work
themselves to the bone in order to make the
world a better place.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Being their offspring, I am naturally expected to
follow in their footsteps. They have always held
me to their own strict standards.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
To be clear, I don't resent them for it. I love them
both dearly.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
My parents gave me a strict upbringing because
they believe I'm capable of great things, and for
that, I am grateful.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Their parenting inspired me to seek my purpose
on the track, which is what led me to Tracen
Academy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But, as you know, I still have a long way to go. I'm
a far cry from the leader they hope I can become.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: So, as I said, it's complicated.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
They may not be pleased to see me proudly
dressed in finery when I have yet to accomplish
anything of note.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Or that's my concern, at any rate. I'm sorry, it
must be a surprise to see me at such a loss.
choice_data_list: Why not present it as a progress report?
I kinda want to see you get told off.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hah. It's all a matter of framing, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Very well. I may do just that.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: If they are dissatisfied with my progress, so be it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Several days later, Symboli Rudolf informs me
that she has received a reply from her parents.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As expected, they didn't mince words... but there
was a small expression of gratitude tacked onto
the end of the letter.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
To think that even this trifling praise leaves me
struggling to conceal my happiness... I really do
have a long way to go.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
In any case, thank you for giving me the push I
needed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It might just be my imagination, but a weight
seems to have lifted from Symboli Rudolf's
shoulders.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haha. You say the oddest things sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Still, you may well get your wish.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I think I will send them the photograph after all.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If worst comes to worst, their disappointment will
sting less if you're there to share it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Several days later, Symboli Rudolf informs me
that she has received a reply from her parents.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As expected, they didn't mince words... but there
was a small expression of gratitude tacked onto
the end of the letter.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Dear me. And I had so hoped to treat you to a
mollified expression.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Yet here I find myself smiling instead. So it goes.
choice_data_list: I'll take that as a consolation prize.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haha. I just can't get the better of you, can I?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It might just be my imagination, but a weight
seems to have lifted from Symboli Rudolf's
shoulders.
